feed.title: HomeLab
feed.subtitle: Guides and thoughts to setting up HomeLab

entry.title: Setup ssh keys for your machines

link.title: Setup ssh keys for your machines

entry.summary: Automatically register SSH keys Guide to automatically add ssh private keys every time you startup your terminal. Prerequisits First of all you need to generate a ssh key. There are lots of ways and encryptions to choose from. Here is an very simple example which usualy does the trick. ssh-keygen -t rsa -f ~/.ssh/<name_of_key>.key If you only type ssh-keygen -t rsa you will creat...
